spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the headline capability the spec promises: navigator.storage.estimate() returns identical quota in normal and incognito. Aligned with the chromestatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive the demo (buttons, selects/inputs, live script) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now annotates the 10 GiB constant byte-for-byte and switches the v151 Incognito formula to the usage + 10 GiB maximal bucket described by the PSA.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature link in the see-also section as the design system requires.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex creeping in, button colours and contrast appear within AA.

summary: DevTools MCP verified /v151/incognitostaticstoragequota/bucketed-formula-explorer/: the page includes the visible 10 GiB = 10,737,418,240 bytes constant, the Incognito mode after-formula reads usage + 10 GiB (10,737,418,240 bytes) maximal bucket, the Blink PSA and ChromeStatus links are present, and the console had no errors.
